mapper.insert: /* Comu.insertComu */ INSERT INTO TB_COMU ( COMU_TYPE, EVENT_ID, CRE_USER, CRE_TM, DEL_YN ) VALUES ( #{comuType}, #{eventId}, #{creUser}, NOW(), 'N' )
mapper.select: /* Comu.selectComuById */ SELECT ID AS id, COMU_TYPE AS comuType, EVENT_ID AS eventId, CRE_USER AS creUser, CRE_TM AS creTm, DEL_YN AS delYn FROM TB_COMU WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/* Comu.selectComuListByOrderId */ SELECT C.ID AS id, C.COMU_TYPE AS comuType, CD_CODE.CODE_NM AS comuTypeName, C.EVENT_ID AS orderId, LAST_MSG.COMU_CNTN AS lastMessage, LAST_MSG.CRE_TM AS lastMessageTm, C.CRE_TM AS creTm, UNREAD.cnt AS unreadCount FROM TB_COMU C LEFT JOIN TB_CODE CD_CODE ON CD_CODE.CODE_UPPER = '10130' AND CD_CODE.CODE_CD = C.COMU_TYPE AND CD_CODE.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COMU_CNTN, CRE_TM FROM TB_COMU_DET WHERE COMU_ID = C.ID AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1 ) LAST_MSG ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TB_COMU_DET WHERE COMU_ID = C.ID AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND REQ_YN = 'N' AND READ_YN = 'N' ) UNREAD ON TRUE WHERE C.EVENT_ID = #{orderId} AND C.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY C.ID DESC
mapper.insert: /* Comu.insertComuDet */ INSERT INTO TB_COMU_DET ( COMU_ID, REQ_YN, COMU_CNTN, FILE_ID, CRE_USER, CRE_TM, DEL_YN, READ_YN ) VALUES ( #{comuId}, #{reqYn}, #{comuCntn}, #{fileId}, #{creUser}, NOW(), 'N', 'N' )
mapper.select: /* Comu.selectComuDetById */ SELECT ID AS id, COMU_ID AS comuId, REQ_YN AS reqYn, COMU_CNTN AS comuCntn, FILE_ID AS fileId, CRE_USER AS creUser, CRE_TM AS creTm, DEL_YN AS delYn, READ_YN AS readYn FROM TB_COMU_DET WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/* Comu.selectMessagesByComuId */ SELECT ID AS id, COMU_ID AS comuId, REQ_YN AS reqYn, COMU_CNTN AS comuCntn, FILE_ID AS fileId, CRE_USER AS creUser, CRE_TM AS creTm, READ_YN AS readYn FROM TB_COMU_DET WHERE COMU_ID = #{comuId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY ID ASC
mapper.update: /* Comu.deleteComu */ UPDATE TB_COMU SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE ID = #{id}
/* Comu.deleteComuDetByComuId */ UPDATE TB_COMU_DET SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE COMU_ID = #{comuId}
